title: SeriousPack
description: The modpack offers an unforgettable story that you can even experience with your friends!
body:
SeriousPack modpack built on the Fabric Loader.
The modpack offers an unforgettable story that you can even experience with your friends!
Recommended Allocated RAM: 4-10GB

Features:

  • New mechanisms with Create mod
  • New food, we're talking over 300 new food types & crops,
  • Over 40 new unique biomes to explore including,
  • Terrific ambient sounds that'll make you fall in love with the nature,
  • A Bunch of New Animals & Creatures & Bosses,
  • Play around with over 1000+ new blocks & furniture making your own dream environment of choice,
  • A ride of storage & utility, we're talking digital networks, backpacks, elevators, wings & much more!

📘 About ModPack 📗

The modpack has many mods that add new structures, monsters, animals, or even improve mechanics, Many of these mods are compatible with multiplayer play which allows you to create servers with this modpack.
